name: HashKey Group
fullText:
🔍 Tim Sun @TiezhuCrypto, Senior Researcher at HashKey Group shared on @FTChinese that the future of #RWA isn’t about tokenizing more assets, it’s about industrializing the financial infrastructure behind them.

🧱 Asset onboarding.
🧱 Legal structuring.
🧱 On-chain issuance.
🧱

name: allincrypto 熬鹰资本 🇨🇳
fullText:
做多了一手原油。
这种趋势行情回调就是做多，准备最多加到5手。
长期战争对原油是有真正的趋势红利的，我觉得还没到顶。 https://t.co/zlHHanPqpS
